description: CASE expression infers String type from string literal branches

columns.name: tier
columns.note: all branches are string literals with ELSE, so non-nullable String

name: case_type_from_branches
query_sql:
-- @name GetProductTier
-- @returns :many
SELECT CASE WHEN price > 100 THEN 'expensive' ELSE 'cheap' END AS tier FROM products
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE products (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, price INTEGER NOT NULL, description TEXT, category TEXT NOT NULL)
